facebook.caption:
POV: you ducked into a random kiosk on Đ. Lê Lợi and found Phu Quoc's only 5-star rated coffee spot.

Mr. Viet Coffee. 277 reviews. Perfect score. Not a single person left disappointed.

Local Vietnamese coffee done right. No tourist-trap pricing. No gimmicks. Just the real stuff.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: 277 people gave this place 5 stars. Watch what comes out of that tiny kiosk on Đ. Lê Lợi. Mr. Viet Coffee is not playing around. This is the cup your whole trip needed.

instagram.caption:

Mr. Viet Coffee on Đ. Lê Lợi is the real deal. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: 5.0 stars. 277 reviews. This little kiosk in Phu Quoc is undefeated. Mr. Viet Coffee, Đ. Lê Lợi.

tiktok.caption: Walked past this kiosk 3 times. Finally went in. 5.0 stars. 277 reviews. Mr. Viet Coffee delivers. #PhuQuoc #VietnamCoffee #PhuQuocTips #TravelTips
